title: D. [MYTHIC / THEOLOGICAL LAWS]
content:
D. [MYTHIC / THEOLOGICAL LAWS]
Timeless symbolic patterns that define ritual, meaning, and transcendence.
[D1] The Fall / Exile Pattern – Knowledge or pride leads to loss of innocence.   [D2] The Return / Resurrection Cycle – Death is followed by rebirth.   [D3] Sacred Reciprocity – You must give something up to gain something sacred (sacrifice = access).   [D4] The Rule of Three – Magic, fate, and narrative unfold in threes.   [D5] Divine Duality – Light/Dark, Chaos/Order, Creation/Destruction are cosmic pairs.   [D6] As Above, So Below – Micro and macro mirror each other.   [D7] The Hero's Journey (Campbell) – Universal map of transformation.
E. [SOCIAL / SYSTEMIC LAWS]
Sociological, economic, and behavioral truths.
[E1] Pareto Principle (80/20 Rule) – 20% of causes produce 80% of effects.   [E2] Peter Principle – People rise to their level of incompetence.   [E3] Parkinson’s Law – Work expands to fill available time.   [E4] Law of Diminishing Returns – After a point, more input gives less output.   [E5] Metcalfe’s Law – The value of a network increases with the square of its users.   [E6] Law of the Instrument – “If all you have is a hammer, everything looks like a nail.”   [E7] Narrative Sovereignty – Those who control the story control the culture.
context: From document: 🧵 Meta-Laws of Reality — chunk 6 (chunk 6/79)
